title: Regime State Dashboard Panel — Live Regime Visualisation for Users
summary: Add a 'Market Regime' panel to the existing per-account local dashboard showing: current HMM state with confidence probability, VIX/VIX3M ratio and contango/backwardation label, % of S&P 500 stocks above 200MA, composite risk multiplier (as a dial/gauge), and a 30-day history of regime transitions. This is the user-facing translation of all regime signals into a transparent, explainable display. For the multi-user SaaS vision, explainability of risk management is critical to user trust — especially for friends-and-family accounts where users are non-professional.
expected_impact: Zero trading impact; high trust and SaaS retention impact — users who can see WHY the bot is reducing exposure are more likely to stay invested through drawdowns rather than disconnecting (estimated reduction in user churn during volatile periods)
deferral_reason: Depends on regime features shipping first — deferred during paper_trading_single_account prioritisation
